name: Blackquill
bio:
Free Harpy, Night Wing Blade. She launches silent attacks at night with Moon Shadow Claw Blades and joined the Net of Secrets for revenge.

Role: Group Bleed
Intro: A Physical Damage Dealer hero that can apply Bleed to many front-midline enemies and increase its own Critical Strike Rate.

skillSlots.name: Banshee Whirlwind
skillSlots.description: Attacks 1 enemy column, dealing 113% P.DMG with 60% probability to inflict [Bleed].

skillSlots.name: Feather Bombardment
skillSlots.description: Attacks 4 random enemy targets, dealing 92% P.DMG with 20% extra Crit Rate.
